news.summary: ZURICH, May 8, 2025 - Adecco has shown strong performance in market share with impressive margins. Despite a 2% decrease in revenues year-over-year, there was a 3% increase quarter-over-quarter. Adecco outperformed the markets, boasting relative revenue growth that was notably strong at +130 basis points. By Global Business Unit, Adecco experienced a 1% decline year-over-year, driven by a significant growth in the Asia-Pacific region at +11% and in the Americas at +4%. However, Akkodis witnessed an 8% decrease in revenues during the year. These results indicate a successful execution that has led to market share gains for Adecco.
news.headline: Adecco Group's Q1 2025 results show -2% yoy revenues, +3% qoq, led by APAC +11% and Americas +4%. Market share gains and solid margins.

news.summary: In Qingdao, China on May 8, 2025, Haier, a top household appliances brand globally, made an announcement regarding their newest television line, the M80 series of 4K Mini-LED TVs. This series, developed in collaboration with KEF, a renowned audio technology brand, aims to set new standards in home entertainment.
news.headline: Haier launches new 4K Mini-LED TV M80 series globally, co-engineered with KEF, renowned for audio technology.

news.summary: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA is set to announce its Q1 2025 results on May 15 at Continental Hotel, Stortingsgata 24/26 in Oslo at 08:00 CET. The presentation will be in Norwegian, with a Q&A session afterward. Tasty seafood will be served from 07:45 CET. For those unable to attend in person, the event can be live-streamed in Norwegian, and questions can be submitted online at https://www.leroyseafood.com/no/investor/.
news.headline: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA to reveal Q1 2025 results on May 15 in Oslo with 08:00 CET presentation. Live broadcast available.

news.summary: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman is optimistic about the state of inflation in the economy, suggesting it has largely dissipated. He foresees global economic tensions settling in six to nine months and is recommending a temporary halt on China tariffs to safeguard American businesses. Ackman, the CEO of Pershing Square Capital Management, highlighted decreasing energy and food prices as indicators of positive economic developments. Recent financial data shows a complex scenario, with a surprising 0.3% contraction in U.S. Gross Domestic Product in Q1 2025 - the first drop since mid-2022. Meanwhile, April saw an increase of 177,000 nonfarm payrolls. For further details, the whole article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bill Ackman predicts global tensions may ease in 6-9 months, favors pausing China tariffs to aid US businesses and notes decline in energy and food prices. U.S. GDP contracted by 0.3% in Q1 2025, nonfarm payrolls up by 177,000 in April.

news.summary: Kenya has implemented a rise in payroll taxes as part of efforts to sustain government operations and settle the nation's debts to foreign creditors. The tax increase is a key component of a critical strategy to maintain financial stability and honor obligations to external lenders.
news.headline: Payroll taxes in Kenya burden salaried workers, adding to debt struggles as the government aims to manage its finances.

Koike-ya to establish US sales subsidiary in California

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been revealed that the country's GDP experienced a significant increase of 4% in the last quarter, surpassing analyst expectations. This growth has been attributed to a rise in consumer spending, government investment, and exports. Furthermore, the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, marking a notable improvement in job market conditions. Analysts predict that if this positive trend continues, the annual GDP growth could reach up to 5%, showcasing a promising outlook for the economy. Additionally, the stock market also experienced a surge, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points, indicating growing investor confidence. Overall, these indicators point towards a strong and thriving economy with potential for further expansion in the coming months.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia surpasses Kazakhstan in oil production, leaving behind the graveyard.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, with a total of 9.6 million people currently out of work. This is an increase of 1.3% compared to last month. The report also highlighted that the number of job vacancies has decreased by 4.8%, signaling a challenging job market for job seekers. Additionally, the average hourly wage grew by 2.5%, reaching $25.76. Experts predict that the labor market will continue to face difficulties in the coming months due to various economic factors.
news.headline: Australia elects climate-focused party in rebuke of Trump.

news.summary: The latest data shows that the economy grew by 2.5% in the second quarter of the year, surpassing the expected growth of 2%. This growth was primarily driven by an increase in consumer spending, which rose by 3.2%, while government spending also saw a slight uptick. However, business investment remained stagnant during this period. On the downside, the unemployment rate rose to 4.8%, with approximately 250,000 jobs lost in the last month. Economists are concerned about the slowing job market and its potential impact on future economic growth. Additionally, inflation has risen by 1.5% compared to the same period last year, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to consider adjusting interest rates. Overall, the mixed economic indicators have experts divided on the outlook for the coming months.
news.headline: Meta secured a significant $168 million win against spyware. Can't help but celebrate!

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.5%. The report also highlighted a substantial increase in job creation, with a total of 400,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, wages have seen a growth of 3.5% compared to last year. This positive trend in the labor market has sparked optimism among economists and policymakers, who believe it signals a strong and resilient economy.
news.headline: Expect a significant trade announcement from Trump; likely a UK deal. Stay tuned! #trade #UK #Trump

news.summary: Stonepeak, a prominent infrastructure company and top US infrastructure investor, has revealed its plan to enter Saudi Arabia with a significant presence. This move involves deploying experienced investment professionals. Honorable Steven Ciobo and Fadi Kerbaj will spearhead Stonepeak's operations in Riyadh. The establishment in Saudi Arabia is part of Stonepeak's broader strategy to bolster its presence in the Middle East. The company's focus on expanding in the region is evident with these key appointments.
news.headline: Stonepeak enters Saudi Arabia, appoints Ciobo and Kerbaj for engagement in Riyadh, expands Middle East presence.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Crowd Power Ventures ("CPV"), a venture studio and strategic investment partner for disruptors in media, marketing, and advertising, has revealed the introduction of a $20 million fund. This fund aims to develop an integrated marketing ecosystem for the creator economy, which is estimated to grow to $848 billion by 2032. Currently, there are 8.1 million young professionals globally who earn through content creation. The creator economy, although flourishing, is facing certain challenges. Independent creators are increasingly looking for support and resources to navigate this rapidly evolving industry.
news.headline: CPV launching $20 million fund to build marketing ecosystem for creators in $848 billion sector by 2032.

news.summary: Gunze Limited, based in Osaka, Japan, and listed on the Tokyo stock exchange as TOKYO: 3002, has recently launched a sustainable initiative by introducing "recycled hangers" made entirely from PCR material sourced from plastic waste. This innovative approach is being implemented at the logistics facilities of its subsidiary, Gunze Distribution Co., Ltd., as part of the company's commitment to promoting "company-wide waste recycling" and contributing to the establishment of a resource-recycling ecosystem. The focus of this eco-friendly effort is on utilizing these eco-conscious hangers specifically for men's underwear products within the Group.
news.headline: Gunze Limited implements recycled hangers made of 100% PCR material at logistics bases to promote waste recycling.

news.summary: NEP Group, a prominent media services provider for live sports and entertainment globally, is strengthening its presence in the Middle East and Asia by appointing Mohammad Hammoud as its inaugural Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) starting May 12th. He brings extensive experience in the media industry. Hammoud will be reporting to Martin Stewart, the interim regional president and NEP Group CEO, and to Mike. This strategic move underscores NEP Group's commitment to expanding its reach in the Middle East and Asia regions.
news.headline: NEP Group names Mohammad Hammoud as first CCO for ME and Asia. He will join on May 12. Hammoud will report to NEP Group CEO and interim regional president.

news.summary: A steering wheel optimized for steer-by-wire steering systems has been created by Toyoda Gosei in Kiyosu, Japan. The innovative steering wheel is set to debut on Toyota Motor Corporation’s Lexus RZ model.
news.headline: Toyoda Gosei introduces new steering wheel for Lexus RZ with steer-by-wire tech, set to enhance next-gen steering.

news.summary: Arizona has made history by becoming the first state in the United States to keep unclaimed cryptocurrency in its original form. This decision comes after a recent veto of a different cryptocurrency bill last week. The move demonstrates a shift in how states handle unclaimed digital assets, setting a new precedent in the evolving crypto landscape.
news.headline: Arizona is the first state to mandate holding unclaimed crypto after vetoing a reserve bill last week.
Announcement: The Annual Shareholders Meeting has been called. Date, time, and location will be shared soon.

news.summary: Today, Comcast Technology Solutions (CTS) and Orange Logic, two leading companies, revealed a strategic partnership. CTS is known for offering extensive multi-modal AI solutions for video comprehension, while Orange Logic specializes in digital asset management (DAM) for forward-thinking businesses. This collaboration, announced on May 8, 2025, aims to leverage the strengths of both entities to drive innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Comcast Technology Solutions partners with Orange Logic for AI-driven video asset management. Collaboration announced on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest data released by health officials, it has been reported that there was a significant increase in confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the past 24 hours. A total of 1,234 new cases were recorded, marking the highest daily increase seen in weeks. This brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 56,789. Unfortunately, there were also 19 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to 2,345. The surge in cases has prompted authorities to reevaluate safety measures and consider implementing stricter guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Apollo-backed Aspen Insurance IPO raises nearly $400M from investors.

news.summary: The highly anticipated Pectra upgrade for Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) did not immediately impact the cryptocurrency market, as the second-largest digital currency saw a mere 0.96% increase in value following its activation on Wednesday. Trading volume also experienced a minimal uptick of just 0.52% in the past 24 hours. Despite significant changes introduced to the Ethereum ecosystem through this upgrade, data from IntoTheBlock revealed a slight 0.25% decrease in daily active addresses within the same timeframe, suggesting a lukewarm reception. Interestingly, there are predictions circulating that Bitcoin may reach $100,000 soon, with Polymarket seeing a surge in bets supporting this notion. For more details, read the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ethereum's Pectra upgrade underwhelms, ETH up 0.96% with a 0.52% volume increase. Analyst predicts ETH could hit above $2,000.

news.summary: Perth, Australia - Woodside has released an announcement in compliance with Listing Rules regarding their business operations. Approved by Woodside’s Disclosure Committee, the announcement includes forward-looking statements about the company’s market conditions, results of operations, and financial condition. No specific details were provided in the announcement.
news.headline: Woodside Energy Group Ltd Annual General Meeting in Perth, Australia; updates by chair Goyder and CEO O’Neill.

news.summary: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has confirmed that national banks have the power to oversee and delegate crypto asset services, indicating a more extensive change in regulations. This move suggests that banks can continue handling and contracting out cryptocurrency services, reflecting a shift in the regulatory landscape.
news.headline: OCC says banks can manage and outsource crypto services for customers, highlighting regulatory changes in the industry.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 7, 2025, Horizon Petroleum Ltd. (TSXV: HPL) (FRA: HPM) (Tradegate: HPM) announced a corporate update on its operations in the Bielsko-Biala and Cieszyn concessions. The Company shared its progress on executing programs in these areas, highlighting advancements in their initiatives. The specifics of the update were not disclosed, but it signals positive developments within the company. This news signifies Horizon's commitment to advancing its projects and interests in the mentioned concessions, indicating business growth and strategic focus. Investors and stakeholders may find this update important in evaluating the company's performance and future prospects.
news.headline: Horizon Petroleum updates on gas assets in Poland; focuses on Bielsko-Biala and Cieszyn concessions. TSXV: HPL.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on May 7, 2025, ONERugged unveiled its latest lineup of industrial AI PCs - the Rugged AI Notebooks EM-X14M and EM-X15M, as well as the Rugged AI Tablet EM-I14M. These devices are engineered to meet the demands of industries like utilities and public services, offering advanced capabilities for the AI-driven future.
news.headline: ONERugged launches first rugged AI-enabled PCs: Rugged AI Notebooks EM-X14M, EM-X15M, and Rugged AI Tablet EM-I14M.

news.summary: Sigma Lithium showcased its strong financial performance by surpassing production targets, with a total of 68,308 tons of lithium oxide in the specified period. This marked a 26% increase compared to the previous quarter. The CIF China Cash Costs stood at US$458 per ton, showing an improvement of 8%, while the All-In Sustaining Costs were reported at US$622 per ton, reflecting a 6% enhancement over previous figures.
news.headline: Sigma Lithium exceeds 1Q25 targets, with 68,308t lithium oxide production, 24% EBITDA margin, and costs outperforming.

news.summary: Strategists at Deutsche Bank have reduced their earnings forecast for the S&P 500 by 15%. This adjustment comes amidst concerns over the impact of Trump's tariffs, leading to a predicted earnings recession for the index. This news highlights the potential challenges facing investors as they navigate the current market conditions.
news.headline: Deutsche Bank cuts S&P 500 earnings forecast by 15% due to Trump-tariffs fallout, recession expected.

news.summary: Stock market futures saw an increase following President Trump's announcement of a potentially significant trade agreement, subsequent to a rise in indexes after Trump relaxed restrictions on AI. MercadoLibre and AppLovin experienced significant surges later in the trading day. The Dow Jones futures climbed as a result of these developments.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase after Trump hints at "major trade deal," MercadoLibre and AppLovin see significant late gains.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Stellus Capital Investment Corporation (NYSE: SCM) announced that it will unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 12, 2025. The report will cover the period ending March 31, 2025, and will be made public after the stock market closes for the day. In addition to releasing the financial results, the company will be organizing a conference to discuss the findings.
news.headline: Stellus Capital Investment Corporation to release first quarter financial results on May 12, 2025, after stock market close.
